business.name: Flash Appliance Repair LLC
business.tagline: When your appliances quit, we don't

hero.headline: When your appliances quit, *we don't*
hero.subheadline: Same-day service in Canton. Real fixes that last, not band-aids.

services_section.label: THE FIXES
services_section.heading: Every appliance, every problem
services_section.subheading: From washers that won't spin to ovens that won't heat

services.title: Washer & Dryer Repair
services.description: Not spinning, not draining, making weird noises? We fix what's broken, not what's fine.

services.title: Refrigerator Service
services.description: Too warm, too cold, or making ice when it shouldn't. Quick diagnosis, real solutions.

services.title: Oven & Range Repair
services.description: Gas or electric, stovetop or oven. If it should heat up and doesn't, we handle it.

services.title: Dishwasher Repair
services.description: Not cleaning, not draining, not starting. Get back to clean dishes, not dirty headaches.

services.title: Small Appliance Service
services.description: Microwaves, garbage disposals, and more. The stuff that breaks when you need it most.

about.heading: One call. Real answers.
about.body: Canton appliance repair that shows up when we say we will. No runaround, no upselling — just honest fixes that work.

reviews.name: Shawn R.
reviews.text: Joe is awesome! Gets you scheduled as quick as possible. We've used him several times with great success. Excellent work!

reviews.name: BRENDA K.
reviews.text: Very professional and extremely knowledgeable. Fixed my washer and oven — had everything running in less than an hour.

reviews.name: Elizabeth P.
reviews.text: Fair pricing, professional manner, perfect timing — showed up when he said and got it done efficiently. Quality work combined with reliability.

cta.heading: Appliance down? We're up for it.
cta.body: Same-day service. Real fixes. No surprises. Call Joe and get back to normal.
